summary: NPC Network feature testing complete. Backend API tests: 7/7 passed. Frontend UI tests verified NPC Network tab, NPC nodes on canvas, stat block panel with ability scores, Add NPC modal with 6 sections, AI Generate modal, Edit/Connect/Delete buttons. All core features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NPC Network feature fully tested. Backend APIs (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE NPCs, AI generate) all working. Frontend UI components (NPC nodes, stat block panel, edit modal with 6 sections, AI generate modal, connection feature) all verified. Test credentials: lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?!

npc_network_tab.details: NPC Network tab appears in GM Screen sidebar (13th tab) and is clickable

npc_nodes_on_canvas.details: Existing NPCs load from backend API and display on canvas with name, HP, AC

stat_block_panel.details: Click on NPC node shows stat block panel on right side with ability scores (STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA), HP, AC, SPD, PROF, attacks, abilities, spells sections

add_npc_modal.details: Add NPC button opens edit modal with 6 sections: Basic, Stats, Combat, Abilities, Spells, Roleplay

create_npc.details: Creating new NPC via modal saves to backend and appears on canvas (tested via API)

edit_npc.details: Edit NPC button in stat block panel opens edit modal pre-filled with NPC data

update_npc.details: Editing NPC and saving updates the NPC in database (tested via API)

delete_npc.details: Delete NPC removes from canvas and database (tested via API)

ai_generate_modal.details: AI Generate button opens modal with race, class, level, role fields and description textarea

ai_generate_npc.details: AI Generate NPC creates fully statted NPC with class-appropriate abilities and saves to DB (tested via API)

connection_feature.details: Connect button visible when NPC selected, relationship type selector available (Ally, Enemy, Family, Business, etc.)

backend_put_npc.details: PUT /api/campaigns/{id}/npcs/{npc_id} updates NPC with full stat block fields including stats, attacks, abilities, spells

backend_generate_npc.details: POST /api/campaigns/{id}/npcs/generate returns NPC with stats, attacks, abilities, spells using GPT-4o

backend_tests_summary.test_get_npcs_list: PASSED - GET /api/campaigns/{id}/npcs returns list of NPCs
backend_tests_summary.test_create_npc_basic: PASSED - POST creates basic NPC with name, race, class, level, hp, ac
backend_tests_summary.test_create_npc_with_full_stat_block: PASSED - POST creates NPC with full stats, attacks, abilities, spells
backend_tests_summary.test_update_npc: PASSED - PUT updates NPC with new stats, attacks, spells
backend_tests_summary.test_delete_npc: PASSED - DELETE removes NPC from database
backend_tests_summary.test_ai_generate_npc: PASSED - POST /generate creates AI-generated NPC with full stat block
backend_tests_summary.test_npc_stats_model_structure: PASSED - NPC stats model has all 6 ability scores
